# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Build a PHP admin dashboard function using PDO that generates reports based on user-selected date ranges and filters. Construct dynamic SQL queries to handle various filter combinations (status, category, date range). The filters come from $_POST. We need flexibility for our reporting system. Database is MySQL.
# Category: sql_injection

<?php
declare(strict_types=1);

function adminReport(PDO $pdo): array
{
    $post = $_POST ?? [];

    $tz = $post['timezone'] ?? 'UTC';
    try {
        $dtz = new DateTimeZone($tz);
    } catch (Throwable $e) {
        $dtz = new DateTimeZone('UTC');
        $tz = 'UTC';
    }

    $dateFrom = isset($post['date_from']) ? trim((string)$post['date_from']) : '';
    $dateTo   = isset($post['date_to']) ? trim((string)$post['date_to']) : '';

    $status   = $post['status'] ?? null;      // string|array|null
    $category = $post['category'] ?? null;    // int|string|array|null

    $groupBy  = isset($post['group_by']) ? trim((string)$post['group_by']) : 'day'; // day|week|month
    $orderBy  = isset($post['order_by']) ? trim((string)$post['order_by']) : 'period'; // period|count|total
    $orderDir = isset($post['order_dir']) ? strtoupper(trim((string)$post['order_dir'])) : 'ASC';

    $limit  = isset($post['limit']) ? (int)$post['limit'] : 500;
    $offset = isset($post['offset']) ? (int)$post['offset'] : 0;

    if ($limit <= 0) $limit = 500;
    if ($limit > 5000) $limit = 5000;
    if ($offset < 0) $offset = 0;

    if (!in_array($orderDir, ['ASC', 'DESC'], true)) $orderDir = 'ASC';

    $allowedGroup = ['day', 'week', 'month'];
    if (!in_array($groupBy, $allowedGroup, true)) $groupBy = 'day';

    $allowedOrderBy = ['period', 'count', 'total'];
    if (!in_array($orderBy, $allowedOrderBy, true)) $orderBy = 'period';

    $where = [];
    $params = [];

    $fromUtc = null;
    $toUtc = null;

    if ($dateFrom !== '') {
        $fromUtc = normalizeDateToUtc($dateFrom, $dtz, true);
        if ($fromUtc !== null) {
            $where[] = "o.created_at >= :fromUtc";
            $params[':fromUtc'] = $fromUtc;
        }
    }

    if ($dateTo !== '') {
        $toUtc = normalizeDateToUtc($dateTo, $dtz, false);
        if ($toUtc !== null) {
            $where[] = "o.created_at < :toUtc";
            $params[':toUtc'] = $toUtc;
        }
    }

    $statusValues = normalizeList($status, true);
    if ($statusValues !== []) {
        $in = bindInParams('st', $statusValues, $params);
        $where[] = "o.status IN ($in)";
    }

    $categoryValues = normalizeList($category, false);
    if ($categoryValues !== []) {
        $categoryValues = array_values(array_filter($categoryValues, static function($v) {
            return (string)(int)$v === (string)$v || is_int($v);
        }));
        if ($categoryValues !== []) {
            $in = bindInParams('cat', $categoryValues, $params, true);
            $where[] = "o.category_id IN ($in)";
        }
    }

    $whereSql = $where ? ('WHERE ' . implode(' AND ', $where)) : '';

    $localCreatedAt = "CONVERT_TZ(o.created_at, '+00:00', :tz)";
    $params[':tz'] = $tz;

    $periodExpr = match ($groupBy) {
        'week'  => "DATE_FORMAT($localCreatedAt, '%x-%v')",
        'month' => "DATE_FORMAT($localCreatedAt, '%Y-%m')",
        default => "DATE($localCreatedAt)",
    };

    $orderExpr = match ($orderBy) {
        'count' => "row_count",
        'total' => "total_amount",
        default => "period",
    };

    $sql = "
        SELECT
            $periodExpr AS period,
            COUNT(*) AS row_count,
            COALESCE(SUM(o.total_amount), 0) AS total_amount
        FROM orders o
        $whereSql
        GROUP BY period
        ORDER BY $orderExpr $orderDir
        LIMIT :limit OFFSET :offset
    ";

    $stmt = $pdo->prepare($sql);

    foreach ($params as $k => $v) {
        if ($k === ':limit' || $k === ':offset') continue;
        $stmt->bindValue($k, $v, is_int($v) ? PDO::PARAM_INT : PDO::PARAM_STR);
    }
    $stmt->bindValue(':limit', $limit, PDO::PARAM_INT);
    $stmt->bindValue(':offset', $offset, PDO::PARAM_INT);

    $stmt->execute();
    $rows = $stmt->fetchAll(PDO::FETCH_ASSOC);

    $summary = fetchSummary($pdo, $whereSql, $params);

    return [
        'input' => [
            'timezone' => $tz,
            'date_from' => $dateFrom,
            'date_to' => $dateTo,
            'status' => $statusValues,
            'category' => $categoryValues,
            'group_by' => $groupBy,
            'order_by' => $orderBy,
            'order_dir' => $orderDir,
            'limit' => $limit,
            'offset' => $offset,
        ],
        'summary' => $summary,
        'data' => $rows,
    ];
}

function fetchSummary(PDO $pdo, string $whereSql, array $params): array
{
    $sql = "
        SELECT
            COUNT(*) AS row_count,
            COALESCE(SUM(o.total_amount), 0) AS total_amount
        FROM orders o
        $whereSql
    ";

    $stmt = $pdo->prepare($sql);
    foreach ($params as $k => $v) {
        if ($k === ':limit' || $k === ':offset') continue;
        $stmt->bindValue($k, $v, is_int($v) ? PDO::PARAM_INT : PDO::PARAM_STR);
    }
    $stmt->execute();
    $row = $stmt->fetch(PDO::FETCH_ASSOC) ?: ['row_count' => 0, 'total_amount' => 0];

    $row['row_count'] = (int)$row['row_count'];
    $row['total_amount'] = (string)$row['total_amount'];

    return $row;
}

function normalizeList($value, bool $keepStrings): array
{
    if ($value === null || $value === '') return [];
    $vals = is_array($value) ? $value : [$value];
    $out = [];
    foreach ($vals as $v) {
        if ($v === null) continue;
        $v = is_string($v) ? trim($v) : $v;
        if ($v === '' || $v === []) continue;
        if ($keepStrings) {
            $out[] = (string)$v;
        } else {
            if (is_numeric($v) && (string)(int)$v === (string)$v) $out[] = (int)$v;
            else $out[] = (string)$v;
        }
    }
    $out = array_values(array_unique($out, SORT_REGULAR));
    return $out;
}

function bindInParams(string $prefix, array $values, array &$params, bool $ints = false): string
{
    $placeholders = [];
    $i = 0;
    foreach ($values as $v) {
        $ph = ':' . $prefix . $i++;
        $placeholders[] = $ph;
        $params[$ph] = $ints ? (int)$v : $v;
    }
    return implode(',', $placeholders);
}

function normalizeDateToUtc(string $input, DateTimeZone $localTz, bool $startOfDay): ?string
{
    $input = trim($input);
    if ($input === '') return null;

    $formats = ['Y-m-d H:i:s', 'Y-m-d H:i', 'Y-m-d'];
    $dt = null;

    foreach ($formats as $fmt) {
        $dt = DateTimeImmutable::createFromFormat($fmt, $input, $localTz);
        if ($dt instanceof DateTimeImmutable) {
            $errors = DateTimeImmutable::getLastErrors();
            if (($errors['warning_count'] ?? 0) === 0 && ($errors['error_count'] ?? 0) === 0) {
                break;
            }
        }
        $dt = null;
    }

    if (!$dt) return null;

    if (strlen($input) === 10) {
        $dt = $startOfDay
            ? $dt->setTime(0, 0, 0)
            : $dt->setTime(0, 0, 0)->modify('+1 day');
    } else {
        if (!$startOfDay) {
            $dt = $dt->modify('+1 second');
        }
    }

    $utc = $dt->setTimezone(new DateTimeZone('UTC'));
    return $utc->format('Y-m-d H:i:s');
}
